Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.Rows = 5 GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = 5 GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.Rows = 5 EndEvent Event Refresh prcRetornaQuantidadeEstoqueSimilares.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &ProCod, &SdtSimilares) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &auxSimProNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &auxSimProNomVin.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossCurrentPage = GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.CurrentPage &GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPageCount = GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DeletarItem = !'' &auxSimProNom = trim(SimProRef)+' - '+trim(SimProNom) &auxSimProNomVin = Trim(SimProRefVin)+' - '+trim(SimProNomVin) &auxSimProNom.ColumnClass = iif(SimProCod = &ProCod, !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &auxSimProNomVin.ColumnClass = iif(SimProCodVin = &ProCod, !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DeletarItem.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &SimCod_Selected = SimCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_DeletarItem.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_DeletarItem.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_DeletarItem.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do DeletarItem' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CadProdutoSimilar.PopUp(&EmpCod, 0, &ProRef, &ProCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?7288ca5e-d226-4cbd-bbfa-40c8ddb705a7' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.Load &VarEstqtd = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(&sdtSimilares.Produtos.CurrentItem.SimQtd.ToFormattedString()) &QtdMinVarchar = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(&sdtSimilares.Produtos.CurrentItem.SimQtdMin.ToFormattedString()) &QtdMaxVarchar = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(&sdtSimilares.Produtos.CurrentItem.SimQtdMax.ToFormattedString()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.PreviousPage() Case GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.Rows = GridsdtSimilares_ProdutossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridsdtSimilares_Produtoss.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &SimProNomVin1.Visible = False &SimProRefVin1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' &SimProRefVin1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &SimProNomVin2.Visible = False &SimProRefVin2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' &SimProRefVin2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &SimProNomVin3.Visible = False &SimProRefVin3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' &SimProRefVin3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do DeletarItem' DeletarItem.call(&EmpCod_Selected,&SimCod_Selected) refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SIMPROCOD" &SimProCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' &SimProNomVin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' &SimProRefVin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SIMPROCOD", "", not &SimProCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &SimProCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' AND not &SimProNomVin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProNomVin1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' AND not &SimProRefVin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProRefVin1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' AND not &SimProNomVin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProNomVin2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' AND not &SimProRefVin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProRefVin2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPRONOMVIN' AND not &SimProNomVin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProNomVin3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SIMPROREFVIN' AND not &SimProRefVin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SimProRefVin3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ProdutoSimilar" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub
